summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN (Part Serial Number) associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date - latest date only for each APU

transformations: Join rotables table to rotables_trend table on psn field
Join rotables table to aircraft table on ac_registr field
Filter rotables_trend to retain only the latest ref_date for each unique PSN
Retain trend_type value of CT5 only
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs of type B737NG with their current CT5ATP health trend values
Each APU is represented only once with its latest reference date
Workorder information is included when available
All required fields (partno, serialno, psn, ac_registr, ac_typ, ref_date, trend_type, event_perfno_i, value) are present in output
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query sources from AMOS Acceptance environment initially, with migration path to AMOS Production upon go-live
